title: Front Office Manager - Aman Resorts India Advisory Limited - Multiple Openings

jsonLd.title: Front Office Manager - Aman Resorts India Advisory Limited - Multiple Openings
jsonLd.description:
Aman Resorts India Advisory Limited is actively seeking a talented and motivated Front Office Manager to join our dynamic team in Indore. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Aman Resorts India Advisory Limited:
Aman Resorts India Advisory Limited is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor F&B service quality and maintain hygiene standards
• Ensure compliance with FSSAI, health, and safety regulations
• Plan and execute banquets, events, and MICE functions
• Manage procurement of hotel supplies and control operating costs
• Handle guest complaints and resolve issues promptly
• Prepare daily operating reports and present to management
• Develop and maintain relationships with corporate clients

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Tour Planning
• Proficiency in Hotel Management
• Proficiency in Revenue Management
• Proficiency in Travel Management
• Proficiency in Sommelier Skills
• Proficiency in Barista Skills
• Proficiency in Customer Relations
• Proficiency in HACCP

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Life and accident insurance
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Indore, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Aman Resorts India Advisory Limited!
